steps.title: Expand and collect terms
steps.content: $x(r-8)+5=20x+29$ expands to $xr-8x+5=20x+29$. Subtracting $20x$ and $5$ gives $xr-28x=24$, or $x(r-28)=24$.

steps.title: Find when there is exactly one solution
steps.content: This equation is linear in $x$ with coefficient $r-28$. It has exactly one solution when $r-28\ne 0$, so $r\ne 28$. If $r=28$, the equation becomes $0=24$, which has no solution.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content:
• 5 gives $r-28=-23$, so the equation has exactly one solution.
  • 8 gives $r-28=-20$, so the equation has exactly one solution.
  • 24 gives $r-28=-4$, so the equation has exactly one solution.
  • 28 gives $r-28=0$, so the equation becomes $0=24$ and has no solution.
The value that cannot give exactly one solution is D.
